---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's missing or awkward today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. For a new AWS service/collector, note the relevant
`List*`/`Describe*` APIs.

## Alternatives considered

Anything you've tried or ruled out.

## Scope check

- [ ] This stays **read-only by default** (any mutating/paid/outside-AWS action
      is opt-in behind an explicit, cost-stating confirmation).
